'''chashubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oikology|oikology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oikology|oikology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chashubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshibith|chæshibith]] || [[word:chæshibij|chæshibij]] || [[word:chæshibish|chæshibish]] || [[word:chæshibi|chæshibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashushubuth|chashushubuth]] || [[word:chashushubuj|chashushubuj]] || [[word:chashushubush|chashushubush]] || [[word:chashushubu|chashushubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashubuth|chashubuth]] || [[word:chashubuj|chashubuj]] || [[word:chashubush|chashubush]] || [[word:chashubu|chashubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashufbuth|chashufbuth]] || [[word:chashufbuj|chashufbuj]] || [[word:chashufbush|chashufbush]] || [[word:chashufbuf|chashufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashubuthu|chashubuthu]] || [[word:chashubuju|chashubuju]] || [[word:chashubushu|chashubushu]] || [[word:chashubuku|chashubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashubuth|chashubuth]] || [[word:chashubuj|chashubuj]] || [[word:chashubush|chashubush]] || [[word:chashubu|chashubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashubuthul|chashubuthul]] || [[word:chashubujul|chashubujul]] || [[word:chashubushul|chashubushul]] || [[word:chashubukul|chashubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashubuthuthu|chashubuthuthu]] || [[word:chashubujuju|chashubujuju]] || [[word:chashubushushu|chashubushushu]] || [[word:chashubuku|chashubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashubuthun|chashubuthun]] || [[word:chashubujun|chashubujun]] || [[word:chashubushun|chashubushun]] || [[word:chashubukun|chashubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashubuthuoro|chashubuthuoro]] || [[word:chashubujuoro|chashubujuoro]] || [[word:chashubushuoro|chashubushuoro]] || [[word:chashubukuoro|chashubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
